code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test27-DEC-2018Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function. Urinalysis reveals significant proteinuria, glucosuria, mild ketonuria, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal), all supporting possible renal dysfunction, likely of tubular origin. Blood glucose is normal, but HbA1c is low, which may reflect recent changes or anemia. Recommend further nephrological evaluation and assessment for underlying causes of renal impairment.
